errors.meaning: Daily brief job completed successfully but Slack delivery failed. Content was generated (flight day summary, Chase Zelle alert, stablecoin deadline flag) but may not have reached #daily-brief channel.
errors.suggestedFix: Check Slack delivery target config for daily-brief job — ensure 'to' is set to a valid channel:ID format (e.g. channel:C0AMSE2TW2X)

errors.meaning: Infrastructure intel scan completed and generated content (OpenClaw/Claude Code version checks, MCP roadmap notes) but Slack delivery to #infrastructure failed.
errors.suggestedFix: Update infrastructure-daily-scan job delivery.to to use channel:C0ANLFZD1TJ format instead of bare channel name

errors.meaning: Calendar gap-fill job ran and filled Sunday's schedule gaps correctly, but failed to post the schedule summary to Slack due to malformed delivery target.
errors.suggestedFix: Fix calendar-daily-fill job delivery target — change 'C0AN2RABC3W' to 'channel:C0AN2RABC3W' in job config

errors.meaning: Cron job failed with 1 consecutive errors
errors.suggestedFix: Check cron job logs for details
